scripts.build: pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --allowImportingTsExtensions --module esnext --moduleResolution bundler --target es2022 --strict --esModuleInterop --forceConsistentCasingInFileNames --skipLibCheck --resolveJsonModule --allowSyntheticDefaultImports src/jobs/buildDigest.ts src/jobs/reviewPendingLeads.ts src/jobs/publishDueReviews.ts
